narrative_suggested: The image presents two graphs related to global temperature data, one showing a magnified view of warming and another showing the same data on a different scale.
description: The image contains two graphs. The top graph is titled 'Magnified Global Warming as Presented by the Media' and shows a sharp upward trend in temperature from 1880 to 2014. The bottom graph is titled 'Global Warming in the Scale of Human Temperature Experience' and shows a much flatter, less dramatic trend over the same period, with a large red bar representing the temperature range.
